summary: Subscription, resource-group, and resource queries via @azure/arm-* SDKs with `az` CLI fallback for whoami. Class-3 `stop-resource` deallocates VMs via ARM REST; propose previews, apply posts — Ghost Shift always refuses (destructive_action).

commands.summary: Return the active Azure account identity (user, tenant, subscription) via `az account show`, falling back to DefaultAzureCredential.getToken if the az CLI is unavailable.
List all Azure subscriptions visible to the authenticated credential with id, displayName, state, and tenantId.
List resource groups in the specified subscription (arguments.subscriptionId or AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID) with name, location, and tags.
List Azure resources subscription-wide or scoped to arguments.resourceGroupName; returns id, name, type, location, and tags.

Deallocate an Azure VM (arguments.subscriptionId+resourceGroupName+vmName, stopMode="deallocate"|"power-off"). Propose previews the POST URL + VM state; apply issues POST .../deallocate via ARM REST. Class-3 destructive — must be gated by work-graph approvalClass ≥ 3; Ghost Shift always refuses.
